message:
test(views): gate dict(G.adj) Mapping conversion (franken_networkx-vkgm)

vkgm and o7yo describe the same adj mapping-protocol gap; o7yo already
patched _GRAPH_ADJACENCY_VIEW_TYPE with get/keys/items/values so dict()
now takes the keys()+__getitem__ path and produces {node: neighbors}
instead of raising ValueError on the 2-tuple fallback. Extends the
parametrized Graph/DiGraph parity test with an explicit dict() equality
assertion against networkx to pin the vkgm contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,9 @@ def test_adj_exposes_mapping_helpers(fnx_ctor, nx_ctor):
         (k, dict(v)) for k, v in ng.adj.items()
     ]
     assert [dict(v) for v in fg.adj.values()] == [dict(v) for v in ng.adj.values()]
+    # Mapping protocol: dict() conversion must produce a node-keyed mapping,
+    # not raise ValueError or unpack neighbor tuples as (k, v) pairs.
+    assert dict(fg.adj) == dict(ng.adj)
 
 
 @pytest.mark.parametrize(
